$comment: Copy to gwork.json at the repo root and edit freely — a missing file or missing key means the defaults shown here are used
$comment_forbidden: Absolute prohibitions promoted to a hard gate — tasklog-check fails (push blocked) if any tracked file matching `path` contains a line matching `pattern`. Only the repo owner overrides, by editing this list. Default: none.

forbidden.reason: money display must use formatMoney() — prod rounding bug
